commands.review_summary:
The branch threads an optional `oneShotCliRun` context from `openclaw agent --local` into plugin tools and uses it so `memory_search` acquires and closes transient QMD CLI managers only for explicit local CLI runs, with regression tests.

PR surface: Source +96, Tests +99. Total +195 across 20 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-level. Current main opens the default QMD manager for `memory_search`, while PR head routes explicit `--local` runs through CLI managers and the contributor supplied real qmd-backed proof that the transient path exits cleanly; I did not rerun the original 10k Docker/OpenAI repro.
commands.review_followup: - [P2] The wait-for-boot repair is narrow and mechanical on the PR branch; the SDK-surface acceptance remains visible as merge risk for maintainers.
